creator: haraldei-freebsdbugz@anduin.net
text: I have submitted a PR to revert the offending commit for [OpenJDK 22](https://github.com/battleblow/jdk22u/pull/1) and [OpenJDK 23](https://github.com/battleblow/jdk23u/pull/5). Nothing has happened with them, though, but there has been some discussions on the freebsd-java mailing list.
